message:
feat(ux): add swarm command center dashboard and command palette (ft-3681t.9.2)

Implements keyboard-first, policy-aware command palette with fuzzy search,
operator level access control, and latency budgets. Includes live fleet
view with health summary, sort/filter, backpressure-aware update throttle,
standard keybindings (10 bindings), and 15 standard fleet operation actions
across 8 categories. 35 unit tests including 2 E2E lifecycle tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
